tail.description: Source node index of each arc

head.description: Destination node index of each arc

c.description: Unit transportation cost on each arc

f.description: Fixed cost to activate each arc

x.description: Flow of commodity k on arc a

y.description: 1 if arc a is activated, 0 otherwise

constraints.description: Flow conservation at intermediate nodes: inflow equals outflow for every commodity at every non-source, non-sink node.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{a \in \delta^+(i)} x_{ak} - \sum_{a \in \delta^-(i)} x_{ak} = 0 \quad \forall k \in K,\; \forall i \in N \setminus \{O_k, D_k\}

code.gurobipy:
model.addConstrs(
    gp.quicksum(x[a, k] for a in out[i]) - gp.quicksum(x[a, k] for a in inc[i]) == 0
    for k in range(K) for i in range(n) if i != O[k] and i != D[k]
)

constraints.description: Arc capacity: total flow across all commodities on an arc cannot exceed its capacity times whether it is activated.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{k \in K} x_{ak} \leq u_a \, y_a \quad \forall a \in A

constraints.description: Knapsack-Cover Capacity Cut (V2 EC1): for each non-trivial node subset S, the sum of min(u_a, D_B) over arcs leaving S must be at least D_B, where B = K(S) is all commodities crossing S and D_B is their total demand.
constraints.formulation: \sum_{a \in \delta^+(S)} \min\{u_a,\,D_B\}\,y_a \;\ge\; D_B \qquad \forall S \subsetneq N,\; S \neq \emptyset,\; B = K(S)

objective.description: Minimize total flow cost plus fixed arc activation cost.
objective.formulation: \min \sum_{a \in A} \sum_{k \in K} c_a \, x_{ak} + \sum_{a \in A} f_a \, y_a

code.gurobipy:
model.setObjective(
    gp.quicksum(c[a] * x[a, k] for a in range(m) for k in range(K)) +
    gp.quicksum(f[a] * y[a] for a in range(m)),
    GRB.MINIMIZE
)
